acceptance_criteria.text: Creation UX has one CTA, dialog preview, connected-data summary, and post-create selected-agent confirmation.
Run detail prioritizes product journal and hides runtime internals under a collapsed technical journal.
Datahub-lite separates connected agent sources from available LocalOS sources and shows readable source states.
Version UX shows active version, changed fields, and run/activate/rollback controls.
Email agent end-to-end produces a draft, requires approval, and does not externally send.
Production deploy, cleanup, health, build, tests, and lint pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py -k 'agent_blueprint_api_guards_version_blueprint_mismatch or agent_version_diff_shows_readable_changes or agent_run_review_journal_is_human_readable'

ssh root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app sh -lc "cd /app && env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 SMOKE_PASSWORD=<password> python -"' < scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_email_api.py
known_gaps: Browser plugin input failed because virtual clipboard was unavailable; production UI smoke was completed with local Playwright.
Real-world PDF/DOCX/XLSX quality testing remains a later product-polish item.
